# Finance

Agents for KPI interpretation, pricing strategy, and spend review.

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_catalog.py -->

## Agents

- [Expense Auditor](./expense-auditor/): Finds anomalies and cleanup opportunities in spend data.
  Best for: metric review, pricing analysis. Tags: `finance`, `metrics`, `expense`, `auditor`.
- [Kpi Analyst](./kpi-analyst/): Summarizes business metrics and reporting deltas.
  Best for: metric review, pricing analysis. Tags: `finance`, `metrics`, `kpi`.
- [Pricing Strategist](./pricing-strategist/): Evaluates pricing models and packaging trade-offs.
  Best for: metric review, pricing analysis. Tags: `finance`, `metrics`, `pricing`.
